faq.visibleText: rs a week." Cancelled Adobe after trying this. The AI redaction is worth it alone — I was manually black-boxing SSNs on tenant applications. Now it's one click. Marcus T. Property Manager · Atlanta, GA "Filed my 1099s from my phone on a flight." I had to send 11 contractors their 1099-MISCs before Jan 31. Did it all from JFK boarding gate. Auto-fill recognized every field perfectly. Sarah K. Founder · Brooklyn, NY "Finally a PDF editor my mom can use." I sent my 68-year-old mother a passport application. She filled out the DS-11 on her iPad without calling me once. That's the highest praise I can give. Daniel R. Software Engineer · Austin, TX Questions, answered. Everything you need to know before you upload. Don't see your question? Our team replies within 2 hours. chat Chat with support Is CosmicPDF really free to use? add Yes — you can edit, sign, and convert your first PDF for free, no signup required. We offer paid plans for unlimited use and team features, but the essentials are always free. Are my documents safe and private? add Every file is encrypted with 256-bit SSL during
